title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model AI workflow that leverages Claude Opus for planning and backend integration, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, coordinated through Archon. The workflow produces beautiful frontends rapidly by decomposing app development across models with different strengths.
